text.title: vector-database-setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for vector-database-setup application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the vector count + qps + self-host policy combination?

branch.conclusion: Use Chroma + Flat index for dev/prototype.

branch.when: vectors >= 100000 AND self_host_ok == true AND filter_complexity == 'high'

branch.conclusion: Use pgvector + IVF/HNSW to avoid new infra.

example.trace: root → 5M vectors + self-host + complex filters → Qdrant + HNSW
example.description: Production RAG with metadata filter pushdown needs and self-host policy → Qdrant + HNSW + cosine.
